testcase.name: test_user_detail_with_history
testcase.failure: test_refactor_regression.py:339: in test_user_detail_with_history demo = next(u for u in users if u["username"] == "demo") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ test_refactor_regression.py:339: in <genexpr> demo = next(u for u in users if u["username"] == "demo") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'username'

testcase.name: test_tournament_round_trip
testcase.failure: test_refactor_regression.py:371: in test_tournament_round_trip assert c.status_code in (200, 201), c.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","title_en"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_RR Tournament","description":"regression","scheduled_start":1781683713586,"level_num":1,"stage_num":1,"subject_id":"bm"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","title_zh"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_RR Tournament","description":"regression","scheduled_start":1781683713586,"level_num":1,"stage_num":1,"subject_id":"bm"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","scheduled_at"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_RR Tournament","description":"regression","scheduled_start":1781683713586,"level_num":1,"stage_num":1,"subject_id":"bm"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
